Interface ClassTypeContainer

All Superinterfaces:
AccessFlags, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
AnnotationProperty, ClassType, Constructor, Method, TypeParameter
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnnotationDeclaration, AnnotationPropertyDeclaration, AnnotationPropertyInfo, ClassDeclaration, ClassFile, ConstructorDeclaration, ConstructorInfo, DefaultConstructor, EnumClassDeclaration, EnumDeclaration, ImplicitEnumMethod, ImplicitEnumValueOf, ImplicitEnumValues, InterfaceDeclaration, IntersectionType, MethodDeclaration, MethodInfo, NullType, Package, ParameterizedType, TypeDeclaration, TypeParameterDeclaration, TypeParameterInfo
public interface ClassTypeContainer extends ProgramModelElement
A program model element that may contain class types.

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ProgramModelElement

    ProgramModelElement.LexicalOrder

    ABSTRACT, ANNOTATION, BRIDGE, ENUM, FINAL, INTERFACE, NATIVE, PRIVATE, PROTECTED, PUBLIC, STATIC, STRICT, SUPER, SYNCHRONIZED, SYNTHETIC, TRANSIENT, VARARGS, VOLATILE

    Fields inherited from interface ProgramModelElement

    LEXICAL_ORDER

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClassTypeContainer
    getContainer()
    Returns the enclosing package or class type, or method.
    Package
    getPackage()
    Returns the package this element is defined in.
    List<? extends ClassType>
    getTypes()
    Returns the class types locally defined within this container.

    Methods inherited from interface ModelElement

    validate

    Methods inherited from interface NamedModelElement

    getName

    Methods inherited from interface ProgramModelElement

    getFullName, getProgramModelInfo, setProgramModelInfo

  • Method Details

    • getTypes

      List<? extends ClassType> getTypes()
      Returns the class types locally defined within this container. Returns inner types when this container is a class type.
      Returns:
      a list of contained class types.

    • getPackage

      Package getPackage()
      Returns the package this element is defined in. Packages have no recursive scope and report themselves.
      Returns:
      the package of this element.

    • getContainer

      ClassTypeContainer getContainer()
      Returns the enclosing package or class type, or method. A package will report null, a methods its enclosing class.
      Returns:
      the container of this element.
